name: How's fault decided in Idaho work slip cases?
description: Comp ignores fault; suits use % negligence.[1]

mainEntity.name: How's fault decided in Idaho work slip cases?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp ignores fault; suits use % negligence.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Irrelevant for workers' comp; employer liable via insurance.** Third-party: jury assigns % under modified comparative (barred if >50%).[1][6] Evidence like ignored warnings factors in. No-fault protects you usually.
